    1. AnonUpdateData(JTerm, JTerm, JTerm, JTerm)

Class AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData
Enclosing class:
AbstractLoopInvariantRule
protected static class AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData extends Object
A container containing data for the anonymizing update, that is the actual update and the anonymized heap.
